I would just like to say that this game is great and is growing in popularity really fast, You can get day 1 cosmetics is shop as of now, Dream is a great owner and developer, great community, I love this game.

Monko Moderator - PoP

I hopped on the game and clicked play, it started spamming GitHub URLs and crashed my headset, I am not unable to play vr because it won’t turn on. I messaged staff in the Discord server and they don’t even care. Meta needs to remove this game before it happens to other people

this is one of those games that has the highest potential and could possibly be the next capuchin. The owner works really hard on the game and it’s just a overall good dev and has a really good team. Also goofy is goofy dream is a W owner and the other dev is nice!
￼

literally 2 maps and no way to buy the cosmetics in the shop place. everyone hyped this up like its the next Gorilla Tag, but it is NOT anywhere close to being the next gtag. the amount of 5 stars make no sense. monkovr is not that fun do not get it.
I just got this game not to long ago and I have met some amazing people and the community is super nice and supportive

It's pretty good and has potential, however, there is a lot of lag, the game doesn't give credits to GCS for making the wardrobe, no credits for some of the scripts, the game doesn't have much to do, and is basically the same forest layout as Vine Tag.
This is really fun you got to get it you can get cosmetics you can meet people there’s so much
owner is my father such a w game it’s getting popular
Love the game, owner is nice, staff is nice, played since day 1
I love being an unc I the game And love the owner aswell
Sure this game is great as well as the owner dream,one thing they could add is a flamingledingle
I really think this game could be the next gtag
